# so_ase.eval_sea_ice

### Functions

| [`fesom_ice_area`](../so_ase.md#so_ase.eval_sea_ice.fesom_ice_area)(src_path, mesh_diag_path[, ...])     | Compute total sea ice area within a specified geographic bounding box using FESOM2 output.   |
|----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| [`fesom_ice_volume`](../so_ase.md#so_ase.eval_sea_ice.fesom_ice_volume)(src_path, mesh_diag_path[, ...]) | Compute total sea ice volume within a specified geographic bounding box using FESOM2 output. |
| [`hadlsst_ice_area`](../so_ase.md#so_ase.eval_sea_ice.hadlsst_ice_area)(src_path[, years, box, ...])     | Compute total sea ice area from HadlSST_ice data within a geographic region.                 |
| [`nsidc_ice_area`](../so_ase.md#so_ase.eval_sea_ice.nsidc_ice_area)(src_path[, years, box, ...])         | Compute total sea ice area from NSIDC CDR data within a geographic region.                   |
